title: Aurora, 33939, Palm Pals Dolce Ice Cream Bar 5In, Soft Toy, White & Brown
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Dolce Ice Cream Bar Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This charming brown and white ice cream bar plush is filled with beans and fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling and a wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Dolce Ice Cream Bar is part of the Palm Pals Craving collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Dolce Ice Cream Bar measures 13cm. Dolce Ice Cream Bar is as refreshing as a cool breeze on a hot summer day. She embodies the essence of summer fun, making her a favourite pal to be around during a warm, sunny day, reminding everyone of the joy and refreshment a simple ice cream bar can bring.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
